texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: BOOKING POLICY
texts.text: BOOKING POLICY

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: * All booking requests will be allocated a Reservation Number
texts.text: All booking requests will be allocated a Reservation Number

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: * A Performa invoice will be issued showing accommodation charges for the booking.
texts.text: A Performa invoice will be issued showing accommodation charges for the booking.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: * a 50% deposit will be requested and is payable within two weeks of the issue date on the proforma. During this period, the booking is held in the system as provisional.
texts.text: a 50% deposit will be requested and is payable within two weeks of the issue date on the proforma. During this period, the booking is held in the system as provisional.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: * Upon receipt of the deposit, the booking is allocated a confirmed status and charted.
texts.text: Upon receipt of the deposit, the booking is allocated a confirmed status and charted.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: * If the deposit is not received, the reservation is automatically revoked and the rooms become available for resell.
texts.text: If the deposit is not received, the reservation is automatically revoked and the rooms become available for resell.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: * Balance of payment is expected before guest arrival - preferably two weeks before arrival.
texts.text: Balance of payment is expected before guest arrival - preferably two weeks before arrival.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: * cancellation policy
texts.text: cancellation policy

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 0-14 days prior to arrival date, 100% chargeable
texts.text: 0-14 days prior to arrival date, 100% chargeable

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 15-35 days prior to arrival date, 50% chargeable
texts.text: 15-35 days prior to arrival date, 50% chargeable
